7 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/Utils.h"
8 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/PropertyHolder.h"
9 #include "IUnitsSystem.h"
10 #include "PMUUnitsSystem.h"
11 
12 using namespace Arcane;
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 void
18 PMUUnitsSystemService::
19 init()
20 {
21  // jour -> seconde
22  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,86400.) ;
23  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,"D.") ;
24  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Time,"day") ;
25 
26  // rad -> deg
27  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,0.01745329) ;
28  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,"deg") ;
29  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Angle,"degree") ;
30 
31  // bar -> Pa
32  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,1.E+05) ;
33  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,"bar") ;
34  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Pressure,"bar") ;
35 
36  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,1.E+05) ;
37  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,"bar") ;
38  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::CapillaryPressure,"bar") ;
39 
40  // md -> m2
41  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,9.869233E-16) ;
42  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,"md") ;
43  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Permeability,"milli darcy") ;
44 
45  // m2/d -> m2/s
46  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,1.157407E-5) ;
47  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,"m2/d") ;
48  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Diffusion,"square meter per day") ;
49 
50  // cm -> m
51  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,1.E-2) ;
52  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,"cm") ;
53  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Radius,"cm") ;
54 
55  // g/cm3 -> kg/m3
56  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,1.E3) ;
57  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,"g.cm-3") ;
58  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassDensity,"gram per cm3") ;
59 
60  // cp -> P
61  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,1.E-3) ;
62  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,"cP") ;
63  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Viscosity,"centi Poise") ;
64 
65 
66  // g -> kg
67  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,1.E-3) ;
68  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,"g.mol-1") ;
69  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarMass,"gram per mole") ;
70 
71  // cm3/mol -> m3/mol
72  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,1.E-6) ;
73  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,"cm3.mol-1") ;
74  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MolarVol,"cubic centimeters per mole") ;
75 
76  // mol/d -> mol/s
77  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,1.157407e-5) ;
78  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,"mol/d") ;
79  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Flow,"mole per day") ;
80 
81  // kg/d -> kg/s
82  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,1.157407e-5) ;
83  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,"kg/d") ;
84  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::MassFlow,"Kilogram per day") ;
85 
86  // m3/d -> m3/s
87  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,1.157407e-5) ;
88  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,"m3/d") ;
89  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::LiqVolFlow,"cubic meters per day") ;
90 
91  // m3/d -> m3/s
92  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,1.157407e-5) ;
93  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,"m3/d") ;
94  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::GasVolFlow,"cubic meters per day") ;
95 
96  // degre -> kelvin
97  m_const_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,273.15) ;
98  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,"C") ;
99  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Temperature,"Celcius") ;
100 
101  // degre/m -> kelvin/m
102  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalGradient,"C/m") ;
103  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalGradient,"Celcius per meter") ;
104 
105  // 1/bar -> 1/Pa
106  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,1.E-05) ;
107  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,"1/bar") ;
108  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Compressibility,"1/bar") ;
109 
110  // J/(g.�C) -> J/(Kg.�K)
111  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,1.E+03) ;
112  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,"J/(g.C)") ;
113  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacity,"joule per gram Celsius degree") ;
114 
115  // J/(g.�C2) -> J/(Kg.�K2)
116  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,1.E+03) ;
117  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,"J/(g.C2)") ;
118  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatMassCapacityT,"joule per gram square Celsius degree") ;
119 
120  // J/(cm3.�C) -> J/(m3.�K)
121  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,1.E+06) ;
122  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,"J/(cm3.C)") ;
123  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacity,"joule per cubic centimeters Celsius degree") ;
124 
125  // J/(cm3.�C2) -> J/(m3.�K2)
126  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,1.E+06) ;
127  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,"J/(cm3.C2)") ;
128  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatVolCapacityT,"joule per cubic centimeters square Celsius degree") ;
129 
130  // 1/�C -> 1/�K
131  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,1.) ;
132  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,"1/C") ;
133  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::InvTemperature,"Reciprocal Celsius degree") ;
134 
135  // W/(m.�C) -> W/(m.K)
136  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,1.) ;
137  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,"W/(m.C)") ;
138  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalConductivity,"watts per meter Celsius degree") ;
139 
140  // CPO.M3/D/BAR -> PA.S.M3/S/PA
141  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex, 1.157407E-13) ;
142  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex,"cP.m3/D/bar") ;
143  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ProductivityIndex,"Productivity Index unit") ;
144 
145  // J/D -> J/s
146  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,11.57407e-06) ;
147  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,"J/D") ;
148  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::HeatRate,"joule per day") ;
149 
150  // J/g -> J/Kg
151  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,1.E+3) ;
152  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,"J/g") ;
153  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SpecificEnergy,"joule per gram") ;
154 
155  // m3/d(cwe) -> dm3/s
156  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,1.157407E-2) ;
157  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,"m3/d(cwe)") ;
158  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamRate,"Cold Water Equivalent Steam Flow") ;
159 
160  // m3 (cwe) -> dm3
161  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,1000.) ;
162  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,"m3(cwe)") ;
163  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::SteamVolume,"Cold Water Equivalent Steam Volume") ;
164 
165  // bar/m -> N/m3
166  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,1.E+5) ;
167  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,"bar/m") ;
168  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::Stiffness,"bar per meter") ;
169 
170  // mm/d -> m3/m2/s
171  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,1.157407E-8) ;
172  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,"mm/d") ;
173  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::RainFall,"millimeter per day") ;
174 
175  // m2/d -> m2/s
176  m_mult_factors.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,1.157407E-5) ;
177  m_short_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,"m2/d") ;
178  m_long_name.setProperty(IUnitsSystemProperty::ThermalDiffusivity,"square meters per day") ;
179 }
180 
181 bool
182 PMUUnitsSystemService::
183 hasMultFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
184 {
185  return (m_mult_factors.hasProperty(unit)) ;
186 }
187 
188 Real
189 PMUUnitsSystemService::
190 getMultFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
191 {
192  return m_mult_factors.getProperty(unit,1.) ;
193 }
194 
195 bool
196 PMUUnitsSystemService::
197 hasConstFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
198 {
199  return (m_const_factors.hasProperty(unit)) ;
200 }
201 
202 Real
203 PMUUnitsSystemService::
204 getConstFactor(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
205 {
206  return m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.) ;
207 }
208 
209 bool
210 PMUUnitsSystemService::
211 hasMultFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
212 {
213  return getMultFactor(unit) != system->getMultFactor(unit) ;
214 }
215 
216 Real
217 PMUUnitsSystemService::
218 getMultFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
219 {
220  return getMultFactor(unit)/system->getMultFactor(unit);
221 }
222 
223 bool
224 PMUUnitsSystemService::
225 hasConstFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
226 {
227  return getConstFactor(unit) != system->getConstFactor(unit);
228 }
229 
230 Real
231 PMUUnitsSystemService::
232 getConstFactorTo(IUnitsSystem* system, UnitType unit)
233 {
234  return (getConstFactor(unit)-system->getConstFactor(unit))/system->getMultFactor(unit);
235 }
236 
237 Real PMUUnitsSystemService::convert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
238 {
239  return m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.)+val*getMultFactor(unit) ;
240 }
241 
242 Real PMUUnitsSystemService::unconvert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
243 {
244  return (val-m_const_factors.getProperty(unit,0.))/getMultFactor(unit) ;
245 }
246 
247 void PMUUnitsSystemService::convert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
248 {
249  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
250  const Real factor = getMultFactor(unit) ;
251  const Real const_factor = getConstFactor(unit) ;
252  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
253  ptr[i] = const_factor+factor*ptr[i] ;
254 }
255 
256 void PMUUnitsSystemService::unconvert(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
257 {
258  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
259  const Real factor = getMultFactor(unit) ;
260  const Real const_factor = getConstFactor(unit) ;
261  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
262  {
263  ptr[i] -= const_factor ;
264  ptr[i] /= factor ;
265  }
266 }
267 
268 Real
269 PMUUnitsSystemService::
270 convertTo(IUnitsSystem* system, IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,Real val)
271 {
272  return getMultFactorTo(system,unit)*val + getConstFactorTo(system,unit);
273 }
274 
275 void
276 PMUUnitsSystemService::
277 convertTo(IUnitsSystem* system,IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit,ArrayView<Real> buf)
278 {
279  Real* ptr = buf.unguardedBasePointer() ;
280  const Real factor = getMultFactorTo(system,unit) ;
281  const Real const_factor = getConstFactorTo(system,unit) ;
282  for(Integer i=0;i<buf.size();i++)
283  ptr[i] = const_factor+factor*ptr[i] ;
284 }
285 
286 String
287 PMUUnitsSystemService::
288 getShortName(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
289 {
290  return m_short_name.getProperty(unit,IUnitsSystem::getSIUnitShortName(unit)) ;
291 }
292 
293 String
294 PMUUnitsSystemService::
295 getLongName(IUnitsSystem::UnitType unit)
296 {
297  return m_long_name.getProperty(unit,IUnitsSystem::getSIUnitLongName(unit)) ;
298 }
299 
300 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
301 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
302 
303 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_PMUUNITSSYSTEM(PMUUnitsSystem,PMUUnitsSystemService);
304 
IUnitsSystem

IUnitsSystem::getConstFactor
virtual Real getConstFactor(UnitType unit)=0
Terme pour passer en unit� standart (local->SI)
IUnitsSystem::getMultFactor
virtual Real getMultFactor(UnitType unit)=0
Facteur pour passer en unit� standart (local->SI)
